title: The Victory Banquet Begins
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the victory banquet begins.
scene: The scene focuses on the victory banquet begins, with Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: that damn hody got what he deserved!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Now to become the pirate King!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Remants of the new fish-man pirates...!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Now, where is straw hat luffy?

summary: The Victory Banquet Begins. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
